CREATE TABLE test_exp (value DOUBLE PRECISION);
INSERT INTO test_exp (value) VALUES (0.0);
INSERT INTO test_exp (value) VALUES (1.0);
INSERT INTO test_exp (value) VALUES (-1.0);
INSERT INTO test_exp (value) VALUES (10.0);
INSERT INTO test_exp (value) VALUES (-10.0);
INSERT INTO test_exp (value) VALUES (0.513513);
SELECT CONCAT('The EXP of 0.0 is: ', CAST(EXP((SELECT value FROM test_exp WHERE value = 0.0)) AS VARCHAR));
SELECT CONCAT('The EXP of 1.0 is: ', CAST(EXP((SELECT value FROM test_exp WHERE value = 1.0)) AS VARCHAR));
SELECT CONCAT('The EXP of -1.0 is: ', CAST(EXP((SELECT value FROM test_exp WHERE value = -1.0)) AS VARCHAR));
SELECT CONCAT('The EXP of 10.0 is: ', CAST(EXP((SELECT value FROM test_exp WHERE value = 10.0)) AS VARCHAR));
SELECT CONCAT('The EXP of -10.0 is: ', CAST(EXP((SELECT value FROM test_exp WHERE value = -10.0)) AS VARCHAR));
SELECT CONCAT('The EXP of 0.513513 is: ', CAST(EXP((SELECT value FROM test_exp WHERE value = 0.513513)) AS VARCHAR));
CREATE TABLE additional_values (id INT, exp_value DOUBLE PRECISION);
INSERT INTO additional_values (id, exp_value) VALUES (1, 0.0), (2, 1.0), (3, -1.0), (4, 10.0);
SELECT id, CONCAT('The EXP of ', exp_value, ' is: ', CAST(EXP(exp_value) AS VARCHAR)) FROM additional_values;
SELECT CONCAT('Combined Result: ', (SELECT CAST(EXP(value) AS VARCHAR) FROM test_exp WHERE value = 0.0), ' and ', (SELECT CAST(EXP(value) AS VARCHAR) FROM test_exp WHERE value = 1.0));
WITH exp_values AS (SELECT value, EXP(value) AS exp_result FROM test_exp) SELECT CONCAT('For value ', value, ', EXP is: ', CAST(exp_result AS VARCHAR)) FROM exp_values;
SELECT CONCAT('The EXP of MAX value in DDL: ', CAST(EXP((SELECT MAX(value) FROM test_exp)) AS VARCHAR));
SELECT CONCAT('The EXP of MIN value in DDL: ', CAST(EXP((SELECT MIN(value) FROM test_exp)) AS VARCHAR));
